What each palette evokes

Think: which one feels like Kart 13?

A — Forest & Terracotta

Rhodope mountains • clay rooftops • reliable warmth • handshake deal • rooted
B — Olive & Wheat

Thracian plains • wheat fields • harvest gold • abundant • generous
C — Stone & Sage

Mountain herbs • old stone walls • quiet strength • understated • lasting
